ChaosHeidemarie.RestComponent.hovertip.d: When discarded from hand by a discard effect, this card is automatically played once.
ChaosHeidemarie.LinkComponent.hovertip.d: When manually played, discard other linked cards that were in hand at play start.
ChaosHeidemarie.BounceComponent.hovertip: At the start of your turn, move this card from draw or discard pile to hand and reduce Bounce count.
ChaosHeidemarie.SwordGraveComponent.hove: This card stays in the discard pile instead of shuffling into the draw pile.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_AURORA_SWORD.title: Aurora Sword
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_AURORA_SWORD.descr: Deal 1(2) damage. When discarded, deal 1(2) damage.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_CRIMSON_SWORD.desc: Deal 1(2) damage. When discarded, gain 1(2) Aurora Chain.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_ETERNAL_REST_FORGI: Rest. Gain a power. At the start of your turn, create 1(2) Aurora Sword.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_UNFOLD_AURORA.desc: Link. Create Aurora Sword for linked cards in hand. Upgrade: cost reduced.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_BATTLEMARK_BOND.de: Gain a power. When an ally attacks, chance to gain Mark. Upgrade: Innate.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_AURORA_CRIMSON_TWI: Gain a power. Whenever you create Aurora Sword, create Crimson Sword. Upgrade: cost reduced.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_SWORD_RAIN.title: Sword Rain
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_SWORD_RAIN.descrip: Gain 1(2) Block. When drawn, create Aurora Sword. Upgrade: also create Aurora Sword when played.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_SWORDLIGHT.title: Swordlight
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_SWORDLIGHT.descrip: While this card is in the discard pile, Aurora Sword damage is doubled. At start of turn, move this to the draw pile. Upgrade: gains Bounce.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_CHAIN_SIGIL_IGNITI: Exhaust. Automatically play all linked cards in hand. Upgrade: cost reduced.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_LINKED_EDGE.title: Linked Edge
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_LINKED_EDGE.descri: Link. Deal 1(2) damage, increased for each linked card in hand.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_CRIMSON_EDGE_RETUR: Create Crimson Sword with Bounce. Upgrade: create more.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_GLIMMER_HARVEST.de: Link. Draw 1(2) card(s). Cards drawn this turn gain Link. Upgrade: gains Rest.
Exhaust. This turn, Rest cards in your hand and Rest cards that enter your hand gain Link. Upgrade: cost reduced.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_HERO_OF_THE_MANY.d: Exhaust. Link. Choose up to 1(2) card(s) and read their names; give Link to all cards with those names and move them to the draw pile. Upgrade: choose 1(2).
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_HERO_OF_THE_MANY.s: Choose cards to read their names
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_LINGERING_AURORA_L: Exhaust. Choose 1 card from the draw or discard pile, give it Link, and add it to hand. Upgrade: no Exhaust.
Choose 1 card from draw or discard pile
Link. Return Attack cards from the discard pile to hand and give them Link.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_THOUSAND_AURORA_SH: Deal damage. For each Aurora Sword in hand, deal extra random damage.
Create Aurora Sword with Bounce. Upgrade: gains Rest.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_RAY_OF_LIGHT.title: Ray of Light
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_RAY_OF_LIGHT.descr: Rest. Gain {Energy:diff()} Energy. If upgraded and discarded by Link cleanup while this has Link, gain {Energy:diff()} additional Energy.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_CONDENSED_AURORA.d: When discarded, returns to hand. After enough returns, transforms into Liberated Aurora.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_LIBERATED_AURORA.d: Exhaust. Deal damage, consuming Aurora Sword to increase damage. When exhausted, create Condensed Aurora.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_WORLD_PURGING_AURO: Deal damage to all enemies. If Liberated Aurora is in hand, exhaust it and Aurora Sword to increase damage.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_SHATTERED_AURORA.d: Gain a power. Whenever you discard {DiscardThreshold:inverseDiff()} Aurora Sword cards, gain {EnergyGain:diff()} Energy.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_SWORD_CURTAIN.desc: Gain a power. Whenever you create Aurora Sword, gain 1(2) Block.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_PRISM_CHAIN.title: Prism Chain
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_PRISM_CHAIN.descri: Link. Draw {Cards} card. Choose up to {LinkCards:diff()} card(s) in hand without Link to gain Link.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_PRISM_CHAIN.select: Choose up to {MaxCount} card(s) in hand without Link
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_SLUMBER_BRAND.desc: Rest. The next Attack played this turn gains Rest. Upgrade: return that Attack to hand.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_EMBER_RECALL.title: Ember Recall
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_EMBER_RECALL.descr: Choose up to 1 card from the discard pile and return it to hand. If you do, create 1(2) Aurora Sword. Upgrade: create more.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_EMBER_RECALL.selec: Choose up to 1 card from the discard pile
Rest. Gain {Block:diff()} Block. For every {LinkedCardsPerBlock:diff()} linked card(s) in hand, gain {BlockPerLinkedBatch:diff()} additional Block. Upgrade: cost reduced.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_REFORGE.title: Reforge
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_REFORGE.descriptio: Link. Remove Link from all cards in hand, then choose {Cards:diff()} card(s) in hand to gain Link. Upgrade: cost reduced.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_REFORGE.selectionS: Choose {Cards:diff()} card(s) in hand to gain Link
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_LINK_PATTERN_REWEA: Choose {Cards:diff()} Aurora Sword or Crimson Sword from the discard pile, return them to hand, and give them Bounce 1. Upgrade: choose more.
Choose Aurora Sword or Crimson Sword from the discard pile
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_CITADEL_AURORA_REL: Gain a power. At end of turn, for every {SwordThreshold:diff()} Aurora Sword or Crimson Sword in your discard pile, gain {AuroraChainPower:diff()} Aurora Chain. Upgrade: lower the sword threshold.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_CRIMSON_EDGE_SLEEP: Rest and Bounce 1. Discard {Cards:diff()} card and give it Bounce {Bounce:diff()}. When this card is discarded from hand, create {CrimsonSwords:diff()} Crimson Sword. Upgrade: more Bounce.
Choose cards in hand to discard
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_RETURNING_EDGE_AUR: Gain a power. Whenever Bounce returns a card to hand, create Aurora Sword.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_FORMLESS_EMBERLIGH: Gain a power. Replace Aurora Sword or Crimson Sword creation with random sword creation. Upgrade: Innate.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_UNNAMED_CARD33.des: Create Aurora Sword, then draw cards. Upgrade: discard after drawing.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_UNNAMED_CARD33.sel: Choose cards in hand to discard
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_UNNAMED_CARD35.des: If you have Mark, gain additional Mark.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_UNNAMED_CARD36.des: Gain a power. Increase Mark damage.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_UNNAMED_CARD37.des: Rest. Search Rest cards from the draw pile, then discard cards.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_UNNAMED_CARD37.sel: Choose cards in hand to discard
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_UNNAMED_CARD38.des: Automatically play the top card of the draw pile, then discard a card.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_UNNAMED_CARD38.sel: Choose a card in hand to discard
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_UNNAMED_CARD39.des: Mark. Deal damage to all enemies; gain Mark when this deals unblocked HP damage.
CHAOS_HEIDEMARIE_CARD_UNNAMED_CARD40.des: Gain a power. When you create Crimson Sword, chance to create more Crimson Sword.
ChaosHeidemarie.RestKeyword.hovertip.des: When discarded from hand, automatically play this card effect.
ChaosHeidemarie.LinkKeyword.hovertip.des: When manually played, discard other linked cards in hand after this card resolves.
ChaosHeidemarie.AuroraChainPower.hoverti: Each stack increases damage dealt by Sword Grave cards.
ChaosHeidemarie.MarkAbilityKeyword.hover: When an ally attacks, spend Mark to deal additional attack damage.
